vibe: Modern, Clean, Sharp, Editorial, Japanese-inspired but minimalist

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Strict bento grid for homepage, standard 12-column for content. Dense and structured.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Thin 1px solid black or dark grey borders (border-border). Sharp edges.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-none hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow duration-200. Alternatively, use hard offset shadow: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] for gamified elements.

component_rules.cards: Sharp edges (rounded-none), pure white bg, 1px border. Image max height 240px. Title text-xl, thin separator line before metadata.
component_rules.buttons: Sharp edges, bg-black text-white or bg-primary text-white. Hover state: invert colors or slide-up effect. Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
component_rules.badges: For categories (Anime, Manga, etc.). Small, uppercase, tracking-wider, rounded-none, px-2 py-1.
component_rules.navigation: Sticky, Solid white background, bottom 1px border. Visible nav links on desktop.
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: rounded-none, border-black/20 focus:border-black focus:ring-0.
component_rules.data_display: Leaderboard and Points use strict tabular layouts with clear left-alignment.
component_rules.thin_lines: Use border-b extensively as a visual separator between list items or sections, rather than using distinct cards for everything.

hero_featured.description: Tokyo street with tower at sunset. Use as the main featured article image on the homepage.

culture_category.description: Kyoto temple in spring. Use for culture or travel related articles.

food_category.description: Sushi on ceramic plate. Use for food category thumbnails.

abstract_background_texture.description: Minimalist Japanese geometric asanoha pattern. Use strictly as a low-opacity background texture (e.g., bg-repeat opacity-5) in hero or header.

editorial_red_accent.description: Abstract Japanese rising sun motif. Use as a graphical element in the quiz or polling section to add editorial flair.

tech_category.description: Neon Tokyo store signages. Use for technology, anime, or gaming.

animations: Subtle and professional. Hover interactions should be crisp. No bouncy/springy animations. Standard CSS transitions for hover states (transition-colors duration-200).
testing: All interactive elements, forms, links, buttons, and navigation items MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case.
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) aesthetic: sharp edges (rounded-none), thin lines, generous padding, and minimalist black/white/red color scheme.
Write all React code in .js / .jsx, not .tsx.
Implement the Gamification Points System (read +2, quiz +10, poll +5, login +3, bookmark +1, share +5) securely in the backend, displaying it prominently on the user profile and navbar.

For Shadcn UI components, execute the CLI to add them and then manually edit the generated files to remove 'rounded-md' or 'rounded-lg' and replace them with 'rounded-none' to match the sharp design language.
Use standard semantic HTML augmented with Tailwind classes for complex unique layouts (like the hero featured article or bento grid), rather than forcing standard Shadcn cards everywhere.
Ensure all fonts are imported appropriately (e.g. from Google Fonts in index.html) and defined in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure data-testids are added to ALL interactive UI elements.
